title: soehrensia tarijensis subsp. tarijensis
intro: Soehrensia tarijensis subsp. tarijensis, also known as the Bolivian tree toad-flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is native to Bolivia and is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or dried and made into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
